title: OxyHydra TexturePack
description: A Light Pink TexturePack For Minecraft Vanilla PvP
body:
# A Light Pink TexturePack For Minecraft Vanilla PvP
**OxyHydra's Pack!** Comes with:
1. Low Fire with Pink
2. Reduced Particle
3. Small Totem
4. Pink Heart End Crystal
5. Better Glint
6. Custom GUI
7. Custom Items

And More!

![Showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fa49f75c96b94ac029a8df617652dc42ffe69965.png)
